dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c Rahane b Narine 39 (29b 4x4 2x6 60m) SR: 134.48

dismissalComment.html: well taken by Rahane!! He slides to his right from extra cover, and grabs this forceful slash from Jaiswal. Narine dangled it up and went really slow, angling across and bowling full and around seventh stump. Jaiswal leaned into the loft while playing away from himself, and ended up playing aerially.

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Ramandeep Singh b Varun 46 (28b 6x4 2x6 44m) SR: 164.28

dismissalComment.html: Varun breaks the opening wicket and he's sent back Vaibhav Sooryavanshi! The teenager went big on the leg side, trying to clear midwicket but he skied that into the blue sky and Ramandeep did very well to run in from the deep, keep his eyes on it throughout and he might have misjudged it a little, but his dive made up for it in the end. Bishop says on commentary that was hit towards the longer boundary

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel st †Seifert b Varun 5 (7b 0x4 0x6 11m) SR: 71.42

dismissalComment.html: caught? or stumped? Either way, Seifert thinks he has Jurel. Yup, it's confirmed that Jurel is stumped. His back leg is clearly short when Seifert has whipped the bails off. Jurel looked to reverse sweep this full delivery wide-ish of off, but lost his balance and missed. Seifert was quick enough to clip the bails, and find his fellow keeper short

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag b Varun 12 (14b 1x4 0x6 22m) SR: 85.71

dismissalComment.html: bowled him!! A bit of cat-and-mouse stuff over these last three balls. Varun is pumped up - how rare of that to happen. He bowls a googly on a short of a length just outside off or thereabouts, and the ball turned in. Parag went for a big heave across the line, but missed. The ball hit the off stump, and sent Eden and Varun into screaming delight

dismissalText.commentary: Shimron Hetmyer c Raghuvanshi b Kartik Tyagi 15 (18b 0x4 0x6 40m) SR: 83.33

dismissalComment.html: got him!! A full toss, but Tyagi gets his man. Seam up from Tyagi, who bowled a full toss at Hetmyer's knee at 142kph. Hetmyer went for a swipe, but seemed to have played too early. The ball took the leading edge, and ballooned for deep third, where Raghuvanshi moved forward to grab the ball

dismissalText.commentary: Donovan Ferreira c & b Narine 7 (7b 0x4 1x6 5m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: caught and bowled!! Narine has Ferreira after beating him all over. Ferreira looked to half push at it from leg stump, and ended up getting a leading edge back to Narine. On a length, and finishing on leg, but Ferreira plays his shot early. The pitch is quite slow, remember, so getting a leading edge isn't entirely unexpected

dismissalText.commentary: Jofra Archer run out (Arora/†Seifert) 8 (5b 1x4 0x6 10m) SR: 160

dismissalComment.html: Arora misses the chance to run Archer out at his end... but Archer is eventually run out at the keeper's end. A comical end to the innings. The third umpire confirms that Archer is miles short of his crease. Arora bowled a bouncer, and got the ball to finish over middle stump as the ball climbed nicely. Archer went to scoop but missed, and pushed for a bye. Seifert threw it to Arora, who couldn't collect the throw cleanly. So in trying to capitalise on the miss, Archer and Brijesh went for the second but Archer fell way short

dismissalText.commentary: Jofra Archer run out (Arora/†Seifert) 8 (5b 1x4 0x6 10m) SR: 160

dismissalComment.html: Arora misses the chance to run Archer out at his end... but Archer is eventually run out at the keeper's end. A comical end to the innings. The third umpire confirms that Archer is miles short of his crease. Arora bowled a bouncer, and got the ball to finish over middle stump as the ball climbed nicely. Archer went to scoop but missed, and pushed for a bye. Seifert threw it to Arora, who couldn't collect the throw cleanly. So in trying to capitalise on the miss, Archer and Brijesh went for the second but Archer fell way short

dismissalText.commentary: Angkrish Raghuvanshi lbw b Jadeja 10 (19b 1x4 0x6 35m) SR: 52.63

dismissalComment.html: loud appeal for lbw as Raghuvanshi misses the reverse and the umpire raises the finger! Jadeja does have a wicket in his first over although Raghuvanshi reluctantly takes the review. Ball-tracking has not even loaded and he's started walking. No edge, pitches on off, hits him on off and that's hitting top of middle. So KKR lose a review

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green st †Jurel b Ravi Bishnoi 27 (13b 4x4 1x6 15m) SR: 207.69

dismissalComment.html: this is unbelievable work from Dhruv Jurel! Green comes down to take on Bishnoi who replies by bowling that down leg. Green doesn't connect, he's caught well outside the crease and Jurel goes a mile down the leg side to collect and then reverse flicks it with his right glove for a throw at the stumps while lying almost flat on the ground. Green knew he was gone and started walking immediately but the umpires checked it to be sure

dismissalText.commentary: Ramandeep Singh b Yash Raj Punja 10 (13b 1x4 0x6 11m) SR: 76.92

dismissalComment.html: chopped on!! Punja is off the mark in IPL. Raman is down on his haunches. Punja tosses it up, and bowls full and wide of off. The ball dips on to Raman, who goes slashing at it by reaching out. But he's beaten by the flight and lack of pace, and ends up getting a bottom edge before the ball drops and hits the middle stump

dismissalComment.html: chopped on!! Punja is off the mark in IPL. Raman is down on his haunches. Punja tosses it up, and bowls full and wide of off. The ball dips on to Raman, who goes slashing at it by reaching out. But he's beaten by the flight and lack of pace, and ends up getting a bottom edge before the ball drops and hits the middle stump
